ARTICLE 1. GENERAL PROVISIONS

§ 7002. Restrictions on the Collection and Use of Personal Information.
(a) A business's collection, use, retention, and sharing shall be reasonably necessary and proportionate.
Authority cited: Sections 1798.185 and 1798.199.40, Civil Code.
Reference: Sections 1798.100 and 1798.140, Civil Code.

ARTICLE 2. REQUIRED DISCLOSURES TO CONSUMERS

§ 7025. Opt-Out Preference Signals.
(a) A business shall process opt-out preference signals.
Authority cited: Section 1798.185, Civil Code.
Reference: Sections 1798.120 and 1798.135, Civil Code.

ARTICLE 9. RISK ASSESSMENTS

§ 7150. When a Business Must Conduct a Risk Assessment.
(a) A business must conduct a risk assessment before processing personal information that presents significant risk.
Authority cited: Section 1798.185, Civil Code.
Reference: Section 1798.185, Civil Code.
